message:
feat(serve): return richer delta info in MCP dry-run responses

Problem:
- MCP tool reflect with dryRun only returned type + content/bulletId
- Consumers couldn't see category, reason, or other delta details
- Made it hard to preview what changes would be applied

Solution:
- Expand proposedDeltas mapping to include all relevant fields per type
- add: type, content, category, reason
- replace: type, bulletId, newContent, reason
- merge: type, bulletIds, mergedContent, reason
- deprecate: type, bulletId, reason
- helpful/harmful: type, bulletId, reason (if present)

This matches the information available in actual delta objects,
making dry-run previews more useful for MCP clients.

Implementation:
- Replace ternary logic with explicit type-based conditionals
- Build response object incrementally per delta type
- Spread base object with type, then add type-specific fields
- Handle helpful/harmful as fallback (check for bulletId presence)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
